11 Sovereign Mega-Tools

init_anchor
Constitutional session airlock. F11/F12/F13.
physics_reality
Earth-witness grounding. Search, time, maps. F2/F3/F10.
agi_mind
Logic, reasoning, synthesis. F2/F4/F7/F8.
asi_heart
Safety, empathy, consequence modeling. F5/F6/F9.
engineering_memory
Vector memory and governed engineering. F10/F11/F2.
math_estimator
Thermodynamic vitals, costs, entropy. F4/F5.
code_engine
System-level observation and execution. F1.
architect_registry
Tool graph and model registry discovery. F10/F11.
arifOS_kernel
Primary metabolic conductor 000–999. F4/F11.
apex_soul
Constitutional verdict and defense. F3/F12/F13.
vault_ledger
Immutable decision recording. F1/F13.

GEOX — Earth Witness Module

Endpointhttps://geox.arif-fazil.com
